hero.title: Manage Your Business
hero.subtitle: A modern, user-friendly ERP solution designed for SMEs. Manage finance, sales, supply chain and more on a single platform.

features.title: We Turn Information Into Actionable Insights
features.subtitle: Comprehensive ERP modules that optimize your business processes, increase efficiency, and provide competitive advantage.

finance.title: Finance
finance.desc: Simplify accounting and financial close processes, optimize treasury and financial risk management.

sales.title: Sales
sales.desc: Maximize revenue with order and contract management, drive sales performance and support your team.

procurement.title: Sourcing & Procurement
procurement.desc: Streamline operational purchasing, automate sourcing and contract management, centralize procurement.

supplyChain.title: Supply Chain
supplyChain.desc: Provide accurate commitment dates, integrate transportation management, streamline warehouse operations.

service.title: Service Management
service.desc: Deliver exceptional, personalized service with holistic analytics and integrated service management.

assets.title: Asset Management
assets.desc: Achieve operational excellence by planning, scheduling, and executing asset maintenance with integrated processes.

howItWorks.title: The Future Is Brighter When You're Strategically Prepared

steps.title: Case Analysis
steps.desc: We deeply analyze your current business processes, needs and goals. We identify areas that require improvement and optimization.

steps.title: Strategic Advice
steps.desc: Based on analysis findings, we create a customized ERP strategy for you. We determine module selection and integration plan.

steps.title: Implementation & Support
steps.desc: We execute the plan, train your team and provide continuous support after go-live to ensure seamless operations.

integrations.title: Works Seamlessly With Your Favorite Platforms
integrations.subtitle: Over 40,000 businesses use Qlass integrated with their existing infrastructure.

items.name: Ahmet Yılmaz
items.text: After implementing Qlass ERP, our operational efficiency increased by 40%. Finance and procurement processes are now much more transparent.

items.name: Sarah Müller
items.text: The integration was seamless and the support team was always available. Qlass has revolutionized our processes from day one.

items.name: James Harrison
items.text: The best ERP decision we've made. Qlass's supply chain module alone saved us 30% in operational costs within the first year.

contact.title: Request a Demo
contact.subtitle: Our experts will identify the best solution for you and arrange a free demo session.

footer.desc: Qlass has been providing modern ERP solutions to SMEs for over 20 years, making a difference with consulting services that support business partners' success.
